revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '{{Template-rating|pre-alpha}} <div class="plainlinks advert" role="presentation" style="margin: 0 10%; border: 1px solid #aaa; border-left: 10px solid #1e90ff; b...'
revision.text:
{{Template-rating|pre-alpha}}
[[File:Different devices.svg|50px]]
This template is adaptive displays differently in '''mobile''' and '''desktop''' view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
{{Documentation}}

{{Template-rating|pre-alpha}}
[[File:Different devices.svg|75px]]
This template is adaptive displays differently in '''mobile''' and '''desktop''' view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
{{Documentation}}

{{Template-rating|pre-alpha}}
[[File:Different devices.svg|75px]]
This template is adaptive displays differently in '''mobile''' and '''desktop''' view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
{{Documentation}}

{{Template-rating|pre-alpha}}
[[File:Different devices.svg|75px]]
This template is adaptive displays differently in '''mobile''' and '''desktop''' view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
{{Documentation}}

{{Template-rating|pre-alpha}}
[[File:Different devices.svg|75px]]
This template is adaptive displays differently in '''mobile''' and '''desktop''' view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
{{Documentation}}

{{Template-rating|pre-alpha}}
[[File:Different devices.svg|75px|left]]{{Documentation}}

{{Template-rating|pre-alpha}}
[[File:Different devices.svg|75px|left]]
{{Documentation}}

{{Template-rating|pre-alpha}}
[[File:Different devices.svg|75px|left]]This template is adaptive displays differently in '''mobile''' and '''desktop''' view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
{{Documentation}}

{{Template-rating|pre-alpha}}
[[File:Different devices.svg|75px|left]]This template is adaptive displays differently in '''mobile''' and '''desktop''' view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
{{Documentation}}

{{Template-rating|pre-alpha}}
[[File:Different devices.svg|75px|left]]This template is adaptive displays differently in '''mobile''' and '''desktop''' view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
----
[[File:MedLogoNoWiFi.svg|50px]]
We have an [[Wikipedia:WikiProject_Medicine/App|offline version]] of our healthcare content. [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Medicine/App#Other language download links|'''Download the app''']] and access all this content when there's no Internet. ([[Wikipedia:WikiProject_Medicine/App|other languages]])
---- {{Documentation}}

{{Template-rating|pre-alpha}}
[[File:Different devices.svg|75px|left]]This template is adaptive displays differently in '''mobile''' and '''desktop''' view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
----
[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|50px]]
This template does not display in the '''mobile''' view of Wikipedia, it is '''desktop only'''. Read the documentation for an explanation.
----
[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|50px]]
This template does not display in the '''desktop''' view of Wikipedia, it is '''mobile only'''. Read the documentation for an explanation.
{{Documentation}}

{{Template-rating|pre-alpha}}
[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|65px]]
[[File:Different devices.svg|75px|left]]This template is adaptive displays differently in '''mobile''' and '''desktop''' view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
----
[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|65px]]
This template does not display in the '''mobile''' view of Wikipedia, it is '''desktop only'''. Read the documentation for an explanation.
----
[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|65px]]
This template does not display in the '''desktop''' view of Wikipedia, it is '''mobile only'''. Read the documentation for an explanation.
{{Documentation}}

{{Template-rating|pre-alpha}}
[[File:Different devices.svg|65px]]
This template is adaptive displays differently in '''mobile''' and '''desktop''' view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
----
[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|65px]]
This template does not display in the '''mobile''' view of Wikipedia, it is '''desktop only'''. Read the documentation for an explanation.
----
[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|65px]]
This template does not display in the '''desktop''' view of Wikipedia, it is '''mobile only'''. Read the documentation for an explanation.
{{Documentation}}

{{Template-rating|pre-alpha}}
[[File:Different devices.svg|65px]]
This template is '''[[Adaptive web design|adaptive]]''' displays differently in '''mobile''' and '''desktop''' view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
----
[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|65px]]
This template does not display in the '''mobile''' view of Wikipedia, it is '''desktop only'''. Read the documentation for an explanation.
----
[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|65px]]
This template does not display in the '''desktop''' view of Wikipedia, it is '''mobile only'''. Read the documentation for an explanation.
{{Documentation}}

{{Template-rating|pre-alpha}}
[[File:Different devices.svg|65x65px]]
This template is '''[[Adaptive web design|adaptive]]''' and displays differently in '''mobile''' and '''desktop''' view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
----
[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|65px]]
This template does not display in the '''mobile''' view of Wikipedia, it is '''desktop only'''. Read the documentation for an explanation.
----
[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|65px]]
This template does not display in the '''desktop''' view of Wikipedia, it is '''mobile only'''. Read the documentation for an explanation.
{{Documentation}}

{{Template-rating|pre-alpha}}
[[File:Different devices.svg|65x65px]]
This template is '''[[Adaptive web design|adaptive]]''' and displays differently in '''mobile''' and '''desktop''' view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
----
[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|65px]]
This template does not display in the '''mobile''' view of Wikipedia, it is '''desktop only'''. Read the documentation for an explanation.
----
[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|65px]]
This template does not display in the '''desktop''' view of Wikipedia, it is '''mobile only'''. Read the documentation for an explanation.
{{Documentation}}

{{Template-rating|pre-alpha}}
[[File:Different devices.svg|65x65px]]
This template is '''[[Adaptive web design|adaptive]]''' and '''displays differently''' in '''mobile''' and '''desktop''' view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
----
[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|65px]]
This template does not display in the '''mobile''' view of Wikipedia, it is '''desktop only'''. Read the documentation for an explanation.
----
[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|65px]]
This template does not display in the '''desktop''' view of Wikipedia, it is '''mobile only'''. Read the documentation for an explanation.
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: CFCF moved page [[Template:Tempalte display]] to [[Template:Template display]]
revision.text:
{{Template-rating|pre-alpha}}
[[File:Different devices.svg|65x65px]]
This template is '''[[Adaptive web design|adaptive]]''' and '''displays differently''' in '''mobile''' and '''desktop''' view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
----
[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|65px]]
This template does not display in the '''mobile''' view of Wikipedia, it is '''desktop only'''. Read the documentation for an explanation.
----
[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|65px]]
This template does not display in the '''desktop''' view of Wikipedia, it is '''mobile only'''. Read the documentation for an explanation.
{{Documentation}}

{{if#:|{{{1=adaptive|}}}|
[[File:Different devices.svg|65x65px]]
This template is '''[[Adaptive web design|adaptive]]''' and '''displays differently''' in '''mobile''' and '''desktop''' view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
|{{{1=nomobile|{{{1=desktoponly|}}} }}}|
[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|65px]]
This template does not display in the '''mobile''' view of Wikipedia, it is '''desktop only'''. Read the documentation for an explanation.
|{{{1=mobileonly|{{{1=nodesktop|}}} }}}|
[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|65px]]
This template does not display in the '''desktop''' view of Wikipedia, it is '''mobile only'''. Read the documentation for an explanation.
|}}{{Documentation}}

This template does not display in the '''desktop''' view of Wikipedia, it is '''mobile only'''. Read the documentation for an explanation.

revision.comment: delink images
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{1}}}| adaptive |
[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=]]
This template is '''[[Adaptive web design|adaptive]]''' and '''displays differently''' in '''mobile''' and '''desktop''' view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
| {{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | nomobile|
[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=]]
This template does not display in the '''mobile''' view of Wikipedia, it is '''desktop only'''. Read the documentation for an explanation.
|{{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | nodesktop |
[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=]]
This template does not display in the '''desktop''' view of Wikipedia, it is '''mobile only'''. Read the documentation for an explanation.
| }}| }}| }}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: strong instead of underline to avoid confusion with non-linked underlined text
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{1}}}| adaptive |
[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=]]This template is [[Adaptive web design|adaptive]] and displays differently in mobile and desktop view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
| {{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | nomobile|
[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=]]This template does not display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the documentation for an explanation.
|{{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | nodesktop |
[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=]]This template does not display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the documentation for an explanation.
| }}| }}| }}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: empty alt attributes for unlinked decorative images
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{1}}}| adaptive |
[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=|alt=]]This template is [[Adaptive web design|adaptive]] and displays differently in mobile and desktop view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
| {{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | nomobile|
[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]This template does not display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the documentation for an explanation.
|{{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | nodesktop |
[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]This template does not display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the documentation for an explanation.
| }}| }}| }}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: readability
switch
Use a proper [[Template:Ombox]] not hardcoded HTML
revision.text: {{#invoke:Message box|ombox|type=notice |image={{#switch:{{{1}}}|adaptive=[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=|alt=]]|nomobile=[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]|nodesktop=[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]}} |text={{#switch:{{{1}}} | adaptive = This template is [[Adaptive web design|responsive]] and displays differently in mobile and desktop view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist. | nomobile = This template does not display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nodesktop = This template does not display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | #default = {{{1}}} }}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: add an option
revision.text: {{#invoke:Message box|ombox|type=notice |image={{#switch:{{{1}}}|adaptive=[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=|alt=]]|nomobile=[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]|nodesktop=[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]}} |text={{#switch:{{{1}}} | adaptive = This template is [[Adaptive web design|responsive]] and displays differently in mobile and desktop view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist. | nomobile = This template does not display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nodesktop = This template does not display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nomobilesidebar = This template does not display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the [[Template:Sidebar/doc|parent documentation]] for an explanation. | #default = {{{1}}} }}}} {{Documentation}}

{{#invoke:Message box|ombox|type=notice |image={{#switch:{{{1}}}|adaptive=[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=|alt=]]|nomobile=[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]|nodesktop=[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]}} |text={{#switch:{{{1}}} | adaptive = This template is [[Adaptive web design|responsive]] and displays differently in mobile and desktop view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist. | nomobile = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nodesktop = This template does ''not'' display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nomobilesidebar = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the [[Template:Sidebar/doc|parent documentation]] for an explanation. | #default = {{{1}}} }}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: add vector2022 option
revision.text: {{#invoke:Message box|ombox|type=notice |image={{#switch:{{{1}}}|adaptive=[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=|alt=]]|nomobile=[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]|nodesktop=[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]}} |text={{#switch:{{{1}}} | adaptive = This template is [[Adaptive web design|responsive]] and displays differently in mobile and desktop view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist. | nomobile = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nodesktop = This template does ''not'' display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nomobilesidebar = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the [[Template:Sidebar/doc|parent documentation]] for an explanation. | vector2022 = This template does not work properly in the Vector 2022 skin. Read the documentation for an explanation. | #default = {{{1}}} }}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: link
revision.text: {{#invoke:Message box|ombox|type=notice |image={{#switch:{{{1}}}|adaptive=[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=|alt=]]|nomobile=[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]|nodesktop=[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]}} |text={{#switch:{{{1}}} | adaptive = This template is [[Adaptive web design|responsive]] and displays differently in mobile and desktop view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist. | nomobile = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nodesktop = This template does ''not'' display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nomobilesidebar = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the [[Template:Sidebar/doc|parent documentation]] for an explanation. | vector2022 = This template does not work properly in the [[Wikipedia:Vector 2022|Vector 2022]] skin. Read the documentation for an explanation. | #default = {{{1}}} }}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Template display]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 332 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{#invoke:Message box|ombox|type=notice |image={{#switch:{{{1}}}|adaptive=[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=|alt=]]|nomobile=[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]|nodesktop=[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]}} |text={{#switch:{{{1}}} | adaptive = This template is [[Adaptive web design|responsive]] and displays differently in mobile and desktop view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist. | nomobile = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nodesktop = This template does ''not'' display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nomobilesidebar = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the [[Template:Sidebar/doc|parent documentation]] for an explanation. | vector2022 = This template does not work properly in the [[Wikipedia:Vector 2022|Vector 2022]] skin. Read the documentation for an explanation. | #default = {{{1}}} }}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Template display]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 5077 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{#invoke:Message box|ombox|type=notice |image={{#switch:{{{1}}}|adaptive=[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=|alt=]]|nomobile=[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]|nodesktop=[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]}} |text={{#switch:{{{1}}} | adaptive = This template is [[Adaptive web design|responsive]] and displays differently in mobile and desktop view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist. | nomobile = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nodesktop = This template does ''not'' display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nomobilesidebar = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the [[Template:Sidebar/doc|parent documentation]] for an explanation. | vector2022 = This template does not work properly in the [[Wikipedia:Vector 2022|Vector 2022]] skin. Read the documentation for an explanation. | #default = {{{1}}} }}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Demonstrate merge of Template:Mobile view problem
revision.text: {{#invoke:Message box|ombox|type=notice |image={{#switch:{{{1}}}|adaptive=[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=|alt=]]|nomobile=[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]|nodesktop=[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]}} |text={{#switch:{{{1}}} | adaptive = This template is [[Adaptive web design|responsive]] and displays differently in mobile and desktop view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist. | nomobile = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nodesktop = This template does ''not'' display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nomobilesidebar = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the [[Template:Sidebar/doc|parent documentation]] for an explanation. | badmobile = This template contains coding that is not compatible with [[Help:Mobile access|mobile versions of Wikipedia]], causing display and [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Accessibility|accessibility problems]]. Read the template documentation for an explanation. | vector2022 = This template does not work properly in the [[Wikipedia:Vector 2022|Vector 2022]] skin. Read the documentation for an explanation. | #default = {{{1}}} }}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: rm redundant word
revision.text: {{#invoke:Message box|ombox|type=notice |image={{#switch:{{{1}}}|adaptive=[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=|alt=]]|nomobile=[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]|nodesktop=[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]}} |text={{#switch:{{{1}}} | adaptive = This template is [[Adaptive web design|responsive]] and displays differently in mobile and desktop view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist. | nomobile = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nodesktop = This template does ''not'' display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nomobilesidebar = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the [[Template:Sidebar/doc|parent documentation]] for an explanation. | badmobile = This template contains coding that is not compatible with [[Help:Mobile access|mobile versions of Wikipedia]], causing display and [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Accessibility|accessibility problems]]. Read the documentation for an explanation. | vector2022 = This template does not work properly in the [[Wikipedia:Vector 2022|Vector 2022]] skin. Read the documentation for an explanation. | #default = {{{1}}} }}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: add nomobile720 option for Template:A-Z multipage list
revision.text: {{#invoke:Message box|ombox|type=notice |image={{#switch:{{{1}}}|adaptive=[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=|alt=]]|nomobile=[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]|nodesktop=[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]}} |text={{#switch:{{{1}}} | adaptive = This template is [[Adaptive web design|responsive]] and displays differently in mobile and desktop view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist. | nomobile = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nomobile720 = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia when the window is less than 720 pixels wide. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nodesktop = This template does ''not'' display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nomobilesidebar = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the [[Template:Sidebar/doc|parent documentation]] for an explanation. | badmobile = This template contains coding that is not compatible with [[Help:Mobile access|mobile versions of Wikipedia]], causing display and [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Accessibility|accessibility problems]]. Read the documentation for an explanation. | vector2022 = This template does not work properly in the [[Wikipedia:Vector 2022|Vector 2022]] skin. Read the documentation for an explanation. | #default = {{{1}}} }}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Template_display]]
revision.text: {{#invoke:Message box|ombox|type=notice |image={{#switch:{{{1}}}|adaptive=[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=|alt=]]|nomobile=[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]|nodesktop=[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]}} |text={{#switch:{{{1}}} | adaptive = This template is [[Adaptive web design|responsive]] and displays differently in mobile and desktop view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist. | nomobile = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nomobile720 = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia when the window is less than 720 pixels wide. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nodesktop = This template does ''not'' display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nomobilesidebar = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the [[Template:Sidebar/doc|parent documentation]] for an explanation. | badmobile = This template contains coding that is not compatible with [[Help:Mobile access|mobile versions of Wikipedia]], causing display and [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Accessibility|accessibility problems]]. Read the documentation for an explanation. | vector2022 = This template does not work properly in the [[Wikipedia:Vector 2022|Vector 2022]] skin. Read the documentation for an explanation. | #default = {{{1}}} }}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: 「[[Template:Template display]]」を保護しました: [[Wikipedia:保護依頼]]による: [[WP:HRT|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]]に基づき、無期限の編集半保護・移動拡張半保護 ([編集=自動承認された利用者のみ許可] (無期限) [移動=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限))
revision.text: {{#invoke:Message box|ombox|type=notice |image={{#switch:{{{1}}}|adaptive=[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=|alt=]]|nomobile=[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]|nodesktop=[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]}} |text={{#switch:{{{1}}} | adaptive = 本テンプレートは{{仮リンク|アダプティブウェブデザイン|en|Adaptive web design}}により、デスクトップ版とモバイル版とで異なった表示ができます。相違点について解説します。（[[Template:Template display]]。参考：[[Help:携帯端末でのアクセス]]） | nomobile = 本テンプレートはモバイル版には表示されません。デスクトップ版のみです。（[[Template:Template display]]。参考：[[Help:携帯端末でのアクセス]]） | nodesktop = 本テンプレートはデスクトップ版には表示されません。モバイル版のみです。（[[Template:Template display]]。参考：[[Help:携帯端末でのアクセス]]） | nomobilesidebar = 本テンプレートはモバイル版には表示されません。デスクトップ版のみです。（[[Template:Sidebar/doc]]。参考：[[Help:携帯端末でのアクセス]]） | #default = {{{1}}} }}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: link to better explanatino
revision.text: {{#invoke:Message box|ombox|type=notice |image={{#switch:{{{1}}}|adaptive=[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=|alt=]]|nomobile=[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]|nodesktop=[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]}} |text={{#switch:{{{1}}} | adaptive = This template is [[Adaptive web design|responsive]] and displays differently in mobile and desktop view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist. | nomobile = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. See [[Template:Navbox visibility]] for a brief explanation. | nomobile720 = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia when the window is less than 720 pixels wide. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nodesktop = This template does ''not'' display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nomobilesidebar = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the [[Template:Sidebar/doc|parent documentation]] for an explanation. | badmobile = This template contains coding that is not compatible with [[Help:Mobile access|mobile versions of Wikipedia]], causing display and [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Accessibility|accessibility problems]]. Read the documentation for an explanation. | vector2022 = This template does not work properly in the [[Wikipedia:Vector 2022|Vector 2022]] skin. Read the documentation for an explanation. | #default = {{{1}}} }}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Template_display]]
revision.text: {{#invoke:Message box|ombox|type=notice |image={{#switch:{{{1}}}|adaptive=[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=|alt=]]|nomobile=[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]|nodesktop=[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]}} |text={{#switch:{{{1}}} | adaptive = This template is [[Adaptive web design|responsive]] and displays differently in mobile and desktop view. See [[Template:Navbox visibility]] for a brief explanation. | nomobile720 = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia when the window is less than 720 pixels wide. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nodesktop = This template does ''not'' display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nomobilesidebar = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the [[Template:Sidebar/doc|parent documentation]] for an explanation. | badmobile = This template contains coding that is not compatible with [[Help:Mobile access|mobile versions of Wikipedia]], causing display and [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Accessibility|accessibility problems]]. Read the documentation for an explanation. | vector2022 = This template does not work properly in the [[Wikipedia:Vector 2022|Vector 2022]] skin. Read the documentation for an explanation. | #default = {{{1}}} }}}} {{Documentation}}

Read the documentation for an explanation. | nodesktop = This template does ''not'' display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the [[Template:Sidebar/doc|parent documentation]] for an explanation. | badmobile = This template contains coding that is not compatible with [[Help:Mobile access|mobile versions of Wikipedia]], causing display and [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Accessibility|accessibility problems]]. Read the documentation for an explanation. | vector2022 = This template does not work properly in the [[Wikipedia:Vector 2022|Vector 2022]] skin. Read the documentation for an explanation. | #default = {{{1}}} }}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing these templates
revision.text: {{#invoke:Message box|ombox|type=notice |image={{#switch:{{{1}}}|adaptive=[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=|alt=]]|nomobile=[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]|nodesktop=[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]}} |text={{#switch:{{{1}}} | adaptive = This template is [[Adaptive web design|responsive]] and displays differently in mobile and desktop view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist. | nomobile = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. See [[Template:Navbox visibility]] for a brief explanation. | nomobile720 = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia when the window is less than 720 pixels wide. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nodesktop = This template does ''not'' display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nomobilesidebar = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the [[Template:Sidebar/doc|parent documentation]] for an explanation. | badmobile = This template contains coding that is not compatible with [[Help:Mobile access|mobile versions of Wikipedia]], causing display and [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Accessibility|accessibility problems]]. Read the documentation for an explanation. | vector2022 = This template does not work properly in the [[Wikipedia:Vector 2022|Vector 2022]] skin. Read the documentation for an explanation. | #default = {{{1}}} }}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{#invoke:Message box|ombox|type=notice |image={{#switch:{{{1}}}|adaptive=[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=|alt=]]|nomobile=[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]|nodesktop=[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]}} |text={{#switch:{{{1}}} | adaptive = This template is [[Adaptive web design|responsive]] and displays differently in mobile and desktop view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist. | nomobile = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. See [[Template:Navbox visibility]] for a brief explanation. | nomobile720 = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia when the window is less than 720 pixels wide. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nodesktop = This template does ''not'' display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nomobilesidebar = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the [[Template:Sidebar/doc|parent documentation]] for an explanation. | badmobile = This template contains coding that is not compatible with [[Help:Mobile access|mobile versions of Wikipedia]], causing display and [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Accessibility|accessibility problems]]. Read the documentation for an explanation. | vector2022 = This template does not work properly in the [[Wikipedia:Vector 2022|Vector 2022]] skin. Read the documentation for an explanation. | #default = {{{1}}} }}}} {{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{#invoke:Message box|ombox|type=notice |image={{#switch:{{{1}}}|adaptive=[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=|alt=]]|nomobile=[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]|nodesktop=[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]}} |text={{#switch:{{{1}}} | adaptive = This template is [[Adaptive web design|responsive]] and displays differently in mobile and desktop view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist. | nomobile = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. See [[Template:Navbox visibility]] for a brief explanation. | nomobile720 = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia when the window is less than 720 pixels wide. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nodesktop = This template does ''not'' display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the documentation for an explanation. | nomobilesidebar = This template does ''not'' display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the [[Template:Sidebar/doc|parent documentation]] for an explanation. | badmobile = This template contains coding that is not compatible with [[Help:Mobile access|mobile versions of Wikipedia]], causing display and [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Accessibility|accessibility problems]]. Read the documentation for an explanation. | vector2022 = This template does not work properly in the [[Wikipedia:Vector 2022|Vector 2022]] skin. Read the documentation for an explanation. | #default = {{{1}}} }}}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:en:Template:Template_display]]
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{1}}}| adaptive |
[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=|alt=]]This template is [[Adaptive web design|adaptive]] and displays differently in mobile and desktop view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
| {{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | nomobile|
[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]This template does not display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the documentation for an explanation.
|{{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | nodesktop |
[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]This template does not display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the documentation for an explanation.
| }}| }}| }}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: overwriting coordinates so I hope they start working
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{1}}}| adaptive |
[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=|alt=]]This template is [[Adaptive web design|adaptive]] and displays differently in mobile and desktop view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
| {{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | nomobile|
[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]This template does not display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the documentation for an explanation.
|{{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | nodesktop |
[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]This template does not display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the documentation for an explanation.
| }}| }}| }}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{1}}}| adaptive |
[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=|alt=]]This template is [[Adaptive web design|adaptive]] and displays differently in mobile and desktop view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
| {{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | nomobile|
[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]This template does not display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the documentation for an explanation.
|{{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | nodesktop |
[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]This template does not display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the documentation for an explanation.
| }}| }}| }}{{Documentation}} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{1}}}| adaptive |
[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=|alt=]]This template is [[Adaptive web design|adaptive]] and displays differently in mobile and desktop view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
| {{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | nomobile|
[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]This template does not display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the documentation for an explanation.
|{{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | nodesktop |
[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]This template does not display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the documentation for an explanation.
| }}| }}| }}{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23626449376|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{1}}}| adaptive |
[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=|alt=]]This template is [[Adaptive web design|adaptive]] and displays differently in mobile and desktop view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
| {{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | nomobile|
[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]This template does not display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the documentation for an explanation.
|{{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | nodesktop |
[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]This template does not display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the documentation for an explanation.
| }}| }}| }}{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{#ifeq: {{{1}}}| adaptive |
[[File:Different devices simple.svg|65x65px|link=|alt=]]This template is [[Adaptive web design|adaptive]] and displays differently in mobile and desktop view. Read the documentation for an explanation of the differences and why they exist.
| {{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | nomobile|
[[File:Handheld devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]This template does not display in the mobile view of Wikipedia; it is desktop only. Read the documentation for an explanation.
|{{#ifeq: {{{1}}} | nodesktop |
[[File:Desktop devices no.svg|55px|link=|alt=]]This template does not display in the desktop view of Wikipedia; it is mobile only. Read the documentation for an explanation.
| }}| }}| }}{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
